title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Project Fellow
shortInfo: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Fellow. Candidates with MSc can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit NISER official website.

basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Fellow. Candidates with MSc can attend Walkin. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit NISER official website.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NISER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NISER Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Fellow position at NISER Bhubaneswar is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Fellow position is an MSc in Microbiology. Candidates must possess this degree to be eligible for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible categories as per government rules.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Fellow post at the National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates from all categories can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Fellow recruitment will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER), Odisha, 752050.

faq.question: What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The recruitment is for a Project Fellow role on a contractual basis.
